description_long: This is a luxurious, black, Chesterfield-style sofa with a classic deep button-tufted design covering the backrest, seat, and front panel. The sofa features high, rolled armrests that are level with the backrest, creating a uniform and stately silhouette. The upholstery appears to be made of glossy leather, giving it a rich, elegant appearance suitable for upscale urban environments. The seat and back cushions are integrated and heavily tufted, providing both visual texture and plush comfort. The sofa stands on four short, blocky legs that are only slightly visible beneath the frame. Its overall design exudes sophistication and durability, making it a striking piece for public or semi-public urban spaces.
description: A black, leather Chesterfield sofa with deep button tufting, high rolled arms, and a glossy finish. The design is elegant and plush, with integrated cushions and a stately silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, deep button-tufted seat and backrest, and both high rolled armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, rolled armrest and the depth of the seat with visible tufting.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth back panel and the tops of the armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and seat depth, with tufting visible along the side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Integrated, uniform seat and back cushions with deep button tufting; all cushions are attached and evenly distributed.
attribute_armrest_style: High, rolled armrests that are level with the backrest, fully padded and covered in tufted leather, with a classic Chesterfield profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of wood or metal with a dark finish.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with deep button tufting, matching the armrest height and forming a single, unbroken line.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Deep button-tufted leather upholstery with a diamond pattern, glossy finish, and no additional decorative stitching.
